338 J0400_PAIN_FREQ_CD J0400_PAIN_FREQ_CD J0400 Pain Assessment Interview: Pain Frequency Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates the resident's pain or hurting frequency over the last five days. -=Not assessed/no information
1=Almost constantly
2=Frequently
